title: その福、捨てるべからず

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's another ordinary day, and I decide to take a stroll through the
academy. As I pass by the student dormitory, however—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Ahhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Waaaah! I'm sorry! I'm sorry! I'm so, so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the halls of the Ritto dormitory, I hear somebody scream,
followed by what sounds like Matikanefukukitaru furiously
apologizing.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Somebody... Please help...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you! Perfect timing! So I'm in a bit of a kerfuffle... Do you
think you could lend me a hand?
choice_data_list: It sounds like you're up to something...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: W-wait! Hear me out! You need to help me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, we're in this together! The great Shiraoki led you to me for a
reason! Follow me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without even waiting for my response, Matikanefukukitaru grabs my
hand and leads me to one of the dorm rooms.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look into the room, but my vision is obscured by a giant mountain of
garbage. The scream from earlier must have come from the now
buried roommate.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
None of this is trash! It's all my lucky charms! I've spent half my life
curating this magnificent collection!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Everything here is too valuable for me to just throw away! But my
treasure mound kind of toppled over and may have completely
swallowed my friend...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's fine though! If I keep this up, I'll have enough stuff to cover all of
Tracen Academy! Or well... I think so, at least.
choice_data_list: Here's a trash can we can use.
Here's a trash can we can use.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Whaaaaat?! How could you say something so blasphemous with
such a straight face?! I can't throw any of this away! Outta the
question!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You know these are my lucky charms, right? The good fortune I
receive from everything here is why I'm at this academy in the first
place! Throw it all away?! I would never!
choice_data_list:
A mountain of lucky items doesn't sound safe
though.

A mountain of lucky items doesn't sound safe
though.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... I guess so... I mean, it's already consumed its first victim...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... It pains me to admit it, but if the trainer sent to me by the
great Shiraoki tells me so, I suppose there's not much I can do...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right, then. I'll get rid of some of it. Just a tiny bit though! Only
the stuff I don't need!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After helping Matikanefukukitaru gather the lucky items she deems
unnecessary, we head to the incinerator behind the school building.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Awww, man... I can't believe I'm burning my lucky items—even a tiny
portion of them. How depressing...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Okay, I think I'm ready... Where should we start?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nooo, that charm helped me reach the top eight in a ball tournament
back in elementary school! Are you mad?! We can't start with
something so important!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No way! Back when I was little, I almost got run over by a tricycle.
That doll got run over in my stead! Who knows what would happen if
we burned it?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's the pudding cup from when I was four and opened one by
myself for the very first time! Burning that is out of question!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Argh, I can't do this! I'm begging you, please don't make me get rid of
my stuff... I'll do anything, I swear!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Matikanefukukitaru fall to her knees in despair, I decide that
burning her possessions might not be for the best and take a step
back from the incinerator.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Every one of these lucky items is dear to me... But at the same time,
taking them back to my room would just lead to someone else getting
hurt...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What should I do? Any suggestions? I'll give you a wisdom charm.
Let's think about it together...
choice_data_list: What if I held onto your stuff for you?
What if I held onto your stuff for you?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You? Hold onto my stuff for me? Would you really?! I'd really
appreciate it! I don't mind sharing luck with you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Seriously... What a huge relief... I was worried for a second there.
Throwing away even one of my lucky items would be... I-I don't want
to think about it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Y'know how I said I'd appreciate you holding onto my stuff for me
earlier? Well... I do, but... would it be okay for me to stop by once a
week to see my things?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! I'm so glad it's you who's watching my stuff for
me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, with that said... Good night! Take good care of my lucky items
for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru bids her belongings farewell and takes her leave,
waving her white handkerchief as she reluctantly returns to her dorm
room.
